nasb.text: Then he called for his son Solomon, and charged him to build a house for the Lord God of Israel.

esv.text: Then he called for Solomon his son and charged him to build a house for the Lord, the God of Israel.

cnv.text: 大衛對所羅門說：“我兒啊，我心裡原想為耶和華我的　神的名建造殿宇，

ccb.text: 大卫召来儿子所罗门，嘱咐他要为以色列的上帝耶和华建造殿宇。
